description_long: This is a metallic kettle with a rounded, bowl-like body and a pronounced spout extending from one side. The kettle features a flat, circular lid with a central knob for easy removal, and a distinctive, vertically ribbed handle attached to the opposite side of the spout. The top surface of the kettle is adorned with a series of evenly spaced, triangular protrusions, giving it a unique, geometric appearance. The base is slightly raised and supported by a small central stand, suggesting stability when placed on flat surfaces. The overall finish is smooth and reflective, with a dark, monochromatic color scheme.
description: A metallic, bowl-shaped kettle with a ribbed vertical handle, geometric top pattern, and a smooth, reflective finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the spout on the left, ribbed vertical handle on the right, and the central lid with knob.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded body, central lid, and the handle's edge profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the spout on the right, handle on the left, and the geometric top pattern visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the handle's full width and the triangular top protrusions, with the spout not visible.
attribute_lid_design: flat removable lid with central knob
